_comment: First-party Oh The Biomes We've Gone compat (wood islands): wood-bearing BWG biomes adapt the Forest island to BWG trees. These bands are PREPENDED by ThemeOverride.Patch.mergeBands so they win the first-match over the base #is_forest/#is_taiga/#is_jungle/#is_savanna catch-alls (BWG biomes are transitively in those vanilla tags via #biomeswevegone:forest etc.). Inert without BWG: every biomeswevegone: id is unknown so the bands never match (Lookup.biomeMatches returns false) and generation stays byte-identical. BWG *_trees features are random_selectors (one placement = one random wood variant), used like minecraft:oak. FLOWER SPRINKLE (v0.175.0): each band also carries a light sprinkle (a few % per column) of that biome's signature BWG flower(s) as ground cover — for colour/flavour, trees stay the focus. Flower blocks chosen from each biome's own BWG flora (verified real BWG 2.6.0 blocks; unknown ids resolve to nothing via Lookup.hasBlock, so still inert without BWG). baobab_savanna/redwood_thicket keep a bare floor (BWG grows no ground flower there) and cypress_swamplands is left as-is (its BWG leather-flowers are climbing, not ground, plants).

biome_overrides._comment: FANTASY woods (enchanted/skyris/spirit) + a trees-first WET-wood overlap (cypress) appended to the Forest family (trees-first priority). The cypress band is the DELIBERATE multi-seed demonstration — the SAME cypress_swamplands biome is water-first on the Aquatic family (biomeswevegone_aquatic.json) and trees-first here. IDS VERIFIED vs BWG 2.6.0 (2026-07-01): biomes enchanted_tangle / skyris_vale / pale_bog / cypress_swamplands + configured features enchanted_trees / skyris_trees / spirit_trees / cypress_trees all exist.
biome_overrides._verify: verified: biome enchanted_tangle + configured feature enchanted_trees (a blue_enchanted + green_enchanted random_selector, so both enchanted plank colours drop). Flowers fairy_slipper + cyan_rose are the biome's own BWG flora.
verified: biome skyris_vale + configured feature skyris_trees. Flowers fairy_slipper + foxglove are the biome's own BWG flora.

verified: spirit wood grows in biome pale_bog (there is NO spirit_woods biome — the earlier guess was wrong; pale_bog places spirit_trees) + configured feature spirit_trees. So spirit wood IS seed-growable after all. white_sage is the bog's own BWG flora.
verified: multi-seed demo — biome cypress_swamplands + configured feature cypress_trees (trees-first here; water-first on the Aquatic family)

biome_overrides._comment: PLANK-COVERAGE woods (backlog #63): the 5 remaining GROWABLE BWG planks not covered by the wood/fantasy bands above — florus / holly / pine / mahogany / rainbow_eucalyptus. Each targets the wood's DEDICATED configured feature (not a biome-mixed *_trees selector that would also drop other woods) so a single clean plank falls, per the Q2 distribute rule. IDS VERIFIED vs Oh-The-Biomes-Weve-Gone-NeoForge-2.6.0.jar (2026-07-01). fir is INTENTIONALLY absent: BWG 2.6.0 ships fir_planks + fir_sapling but NO configured fir tree feature and no biome tree-selector references fir, so fir is non-growable via worldgen (obtain the sapling by other means; documented in BWGPLAN § Plank coverage audit).
biome_overrides._verify: verified: biome forgotten_forest + dedicated configured feature florus_trees. Flowers pink_daffodil + angelica are the biome's own BWG flora.
verified: biome dacite_ridges + dedicated configured feature holly_trees. iris is the biome's own BWG flora.

verified: biome black_forest + features pine_tree1 + pine_tree2 (there is NO pine_trees aggregate in 2.6.0 — both leaf features are targeted directly so pure pine drops). black_rose is the biome's own BWG flora.

verified: biome tropical_rainforest + dedicated configured feature mahogany_trees (worldgen otherwise only mixes mahogany into rainforest_trees — this targets mahogany_trees for pure mahogany). delphinium is the biome's own BWG flora.

verified: biome fragment_jungle + dedicated configured feature rainbow_eucalyptus_trees (large trees — kept sparser via spacing 3; worldgen otherwise only mixes it into fragment_jungle_trees). Flowers protea_flower + delphinium are the biome's own BWG flora.
